description: Working on HubSpot–NetSuite integrations, implementing full CRUD functionality and improving user workflows by reducing manual operations. Contributing to migration of NetSuite integrations from SuiteBundle to SuiteApp, including handling large-scale custom record migrations. Improved backend performance by optimizing Node.js services and working on scalable asynchronous workflows using AWS SQS and Step Functions.

Developed and shipped production features for the CloudExtend platform used by enterprise customers. Implemented key features like Delete Associations to reduce manual effort and improve data consistency. Resolved critical customer-impacting issues by collaborating with external teams. Contributed to backend performance improvements by migrating services from C# to Node.js and worked on asynchronous processing workflows using AWS services. Also built an AI-powered SuiteQL feature enabling natural language query generation.

Developed an Outlook email add-in integrated with NetSuite workflows, enabling ERP actions directly from email. Built frontend components and backend APIs, and improved logging and debugging processes to streamline development and testing.
